title: 20cm Ceramic Vase Black Matte Round Modern Design, Boho Vase for Aesthetic Decoration, Keeping Flower for Living Room, Bedroom Decoration, Simple Nordic Style (Black)
features: 【APPEARANCE DESIGN】 Modern minimalist ceramic vase with vertical texture, elegant and simple, perfect for modern country house decor. The product is fired at high temperatures for durability; perfect for living room, dining room, bathroom, tabletop, mantelpiece, or workspace.

【MULTIPURPOSE】 The ceramic vase can be used alone or with fresh or dried flowers, stems, bouquets, and greenery; makes a beautiful centerpiece for a bookshelf, coffee table, desk, bookcase, farmhouse, mantel, or dining table.
【Size】9.2 x 5 x 20.5 cm The uniquely shaped vertical vase can also be used for personal decoration and modern art deco.
Colours: Available in a variety of colours, white, black, beige, orange, blue, pink, suitable for a variety of decorative styles

【BEST GIFT】 The best gift for all kinds of important days or to express love to someone special; perfect for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, birthdays, Christmas, anniversaries, housewarming etc., ideal for modern home decor, dining room decor and neutral home decor.
